pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Jakarta EE API from version 9 to 10 to support Java 21 and modernize the enterprise stack.
Update Payara Micro server version to a release compatible with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 10.
Upgrade MicroProfile specification version to 6.1 to match the new Jakarta EE 10 runtime.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from a JRE 17 Alpine variant to a JRE 21 Alpine variant to align with the target JDK version.
